description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and a stainless steel backDial style: Silver-toned textured dial, has glow-in-the-dark inlays on the hour and minute handsFeatures: A screw to reset the time, two subdials for hour and month, a date aperture, two push buttons to adjust the featuresStrap style: Black textured genuine leather strap, secured with a tang claspWater-resistant up to 30 mComes in a signature GIORDANO caseWarranty: 2-year international warranty
